_meta.description: Primary experiment configuration for CLIRS. Edit this file; see run.yaml for a flat readable reference.
_meta.status: active — pipelines/run_pipeline.py loads this file by default
_meta.metrics_note: Metric definitions (life, end, …) live in Utils/complete_algorithm.py and are copied into Results/.../manifest.json on first trial — not duplicated here.

orchestration._note: pipelines/run_pipeline.py runs these in order. jcrec_fair = primary baseline (test split); jcrec = author reproduction.

seeds._note: data seed: subsample + split + clustering. rl_seed for trial t = rl_base + t.

model._note: algorithm: shared by CLIRS + JCRec (dqn | ppo)

_rules.first_recommendation: C_1 in each k-step sequence; always bonused; sets initial R'_adjusted,ref
_rules.progress_increase: R_base > R'_adjusted,ref; bonus applied and ref updated
_rules.no_improvement: R_base <= R'_adjusted,ref; neutral multiplier; ref unchanged
